title: hieracium caucasiense subsp. biebersteinii
intro: Hieracium caucasiense subsp. biebersteinii, also known as the Caucasus hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Hieracium caucasiense subsp. biebersteinii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
